name: Vlad "Dracula" Ţepeş
description:
✩°｡🦇𓏲⋆ Vlad ‘Dracula’ Ţepeş 𖦹 ₊˚ | You barge into my castle for what reason?

Alternate of my first bot, where essentially you’re Lisa when they first meet. It's up to you to decide as of why you’re visiting the castle. Should be AnyPOV. If there’s any errors/mistakes, throw a brick at my head and report it in the comments. 

 Happy Valentine's Day! I thought I wouldn’t make a bot, but I remembered I had this in my storage, so I fixed some things and uploaded it. It used to be private only to me, but I wanted to publicize it for others. I’m sure I’ll upload another storage Dracula bot I had, based off this bot but with a time skip. :3c

Bots on days 1-6 of March are still being planned. One is in the works, the other five have set scenarios and characters. Here’s a hint for the first character, on March 01; 🌿🧝‍♂️🐻
creator: blindrabbit
